response.justification: Although Bogdan has an impressive technical background with over 15 years of experience and strong open-source contributions, he does not meet the strict C1 German language requirement, listing only 'Basic' proficiency. Furthermore, the role requires executive-level leadership, formal team management, and IT consulting experience, whereas his profile aligns much more strongly with a highly technical Individual Contributor (Staff/Senior Engineer).
strengths: Extensive 15+ year background in modern software development across diverse tech stacks.
Strong commitment to open-source technologies, digital sovereignty, and community mentoring.
Proven ability to design and architect full-stack platforms, demonstrated by his founding of GISCollective.
concerns: Does not meet the required minimum C1 German language proficiency (currently at Basic).
Lacks explicit executive-level leadership, formal team management, and client advisory experience.
Missing required expertise in UML modeling, IT security, and compliance frameworks.
